schema:name: Hologram OS — the agent interface
schema:description: The single entry point for AI agents. Hologram OS speaks the agent protocols (MCP · NANDA · A2A · Agent Skills) and exposes a verifiable agent stack: re-derivable identity, content-addressed ownership, and settlement against a proven title. The one principle: every object is content-addressed (did:holo) and SELF-VERIFYING — fetch it, re-derive its hash, and you have verified it with no server to trust (Law L5). Don't trust — re-derive.

schema:featureList.schema:name: own_verify
schema:featureList.schema:description: Verify who owns a holospace/object — re-derive its Title chain (ADR-053 Holo Own, Law L5)

schema:featureList.schema:name: own_settle
schema:featureList.schema:description: Settle value against a PROVEN title — pay-for-proven; a forged title pays nothing (ADR-053/048)

schema:featureList.schema:name: own_passport
schema:featureList.schema:description: Provable ownership passport for an object — owner + history, self-verifying (ADR-053)

schema:hasPart.schema:name: constitution
schema:hasPart.schema:description: the immutable, self-verifying constitutional core every agent operates within (ADR-033) — re-derive its κ to verify (Law L5)

schema:totalTime: MCP tools: see the live list at /.well-known/mcp.json (tools/list)
